ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target value (e.g., 1 for popular, 0 for less popular) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the song contains explicit content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of audio features */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the features belong to */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Measure of acousticness (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of danceability (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Measure of energy (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Measure of instrumentalness (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, C=0, C#=1, etc.) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of liveness (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of speechiness (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of valence (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "num_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track in a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track is in */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the track as favorite */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "marked_date" TEXT /* Date the track was marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the track is recommended */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the track was recommended */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on user's listening history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist-genre association */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-genre association */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
